news.title:
Airlines and OMCs discuss ATF pricing revision amid West Asia crisis.
Goal is to cushion aviation from surging jet fuel costs.
news.summary:
Airlines and OMCs discuss ATF pricing revision amid West Asia crisis.
Goal is to cushion aviation from surging jet fuel costs.

news.title:
Middle East conflict pushes crude prices up 50% since Feb 28, straining global markets.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may face impact on petrol pricing amid supply crunch.
news.summary:
Middle East conflict pushes crude prices up 50% since Feb 28, straining global markets.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may face impact on petrol pricing amid supply crunch.

news.title:
BPCL, HPCL, and IOC reversed early gains after excise duty cuts on fuel impacted their outlook amid volatile crude prices.
BPCL fell to ₹282.1, HPCL to ₹342.4, and IOC to ₹137.59 after initial surges, with long-term challenges persisting.
news.summary:
BPCL, HPCL, and IOC reversed early gains after excise duty cuts on fuel impacted their outlook amid volatile crude prices.
BPCL fell to ₹282.1, HPCL to ₹342.4, and IOC to ₹137.59 after initial surges, with long-term challenges persisting.

news.title:
Nayara Energy hiked petrol by Rs 5.3 and diesel by Rs 3/litre amid volatile global oil prices.
The hikes may shift market share to IOCL, BPCL, HPCL, risking Rs 202-1,000 crore in losses for OMCs.
news.summary:
Nayara Energy hiked petrol by Rs 5.3 and diesel by Rs 3/litre amid volatile global oil prices.
The hikes may shift market share to IOCL, BPCL, HPCL, risking Rs 202-1,000 crore in losses for OMCs.

news.title:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol, diesel by ₹10/litre; imposes levies on exports.
Move aims to ease financial strain on state-run oil firms; no pump price reduction for consumers.
news.summary:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol, diesel by ₹10/litre; imposes levies on exports.
Move aims to ease financial strain on state-run oil firms; no pump price reduction for consumers.

news.title:
Govt boosts commercial LPG allocations by 20%, reaching 70% of pre-crisis levels.
Extra LPG supply prioritizes steel, auto, textiles, chemicals, and plastics sectors.
news.summary:
Govt boosts commercial LPG allocations by 20%, reaching 70% of pre-crisis levels.
Extra LPG supply prioritizes steel, auto, textiles, chemicals, and plastics sectors.

news.title:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol to Rs 3/litre, scraps it on diesel.
HPCL, BPCL, IOC shares likely to stay in focus post policy change.
news.summary:
Govt cuts excise duty on petrol to Rs 3/litre, scraps it on diesel.
HPCL, BPCL, IOC shares likely to stay in focus post policy change.

news.title:
BPCL and IDBI Bank among 10 stocks hit hard, falling up to 54%.
Global markets, including Dalal Street, struggle as Iran-US war spikes oil prices.
news.summary:
BPCL and IDBI Bank among 10 stocks hit hard, falling up to 54%.
Global markets, including Dalal Street, struggle as Iran-US war spikes oil prices.

news.title:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.
news.summary:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.

news.title:
India commissions 8,000 TPA green hydrogen capacity till Feb 2026.
Govt targets 5 MMT green hydrogen annually by 2030 under NGHM.
news.summary:
India commissions 8,000 TPA green hydrogen capacity till Feb 2026.
Govt targets 5 MMT green hydrogen annually by 2030 under NGHM.

news.title:
India resumes Iranian LPG imports after U.S. eases sanctions, ending years-long halt.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may benefit as Iran's energy trade reopens.
news.summary:
India resumes Iranian LPG imports after U.S. eases sanctions, ending years-long halt.
Indian Oil, HPCL, and BPCL may benefit as Iran's energy trade reopens.

news.title:
State-run oil firms assure no shortage of petrol, diesel, or LPG despite panic buying.
Consumers urged to avoid panic buying as long queues seen at fuel stations in cities.
news.summary:
State-run oil firms assure no shortage of petrol, diesel, or LPG despite panic buying.

news.title: BPCL denies rumors of petrol and diesel shortages, assures normal fuel supply.
news.summary: BPCL denies rumors of petrol and diesel shortages, assures normal fuel supply.

news.title:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC may report Q4 profits despite negative petrol/diesel margins.
Auto fuel/LPG under-recoveries could reach Rs 35,000-50,000 crore/month; windfall taxes may cover Rs 9,000-18,000 crore.
news.summary:
OMCs like BPCL, HPCL, and IOC may report Q4 profits despite negative petrol/diesel margins.
Auto fuel/LPG under-recoveries could reach Rs 35,000-50,000 crore/month; windfall taxes may cover Rs 9,000-18,000 crore.

news.title:
BPCL secures a contract to supply 10 KTPA green hydrogen to NRL, marking progress in energy transition.
BPCL shares rose 3.96% to Rs 282.25 on BSE, reflecting investor confidence in its green hydrogen initiative.
news.summary:
BPCL secures a contract to supply 10 KTPA green hydrogen to NRL, marking progress in energy transition.
BPCL shares rose 3.96% to Rs 282.25 on BSE, reflecting investor confidence in its green hydrogen initiative.

news.title:
BPCL commissions 2G Bioethanol Refinery at Bargarh, producing 100 KL/day.
The ZLD plant supports E20 Ethanol Blending Programme, reducing emissions and fostering sustainability.
news.summary:
BPCL commissions 2G Bioethanol Refinery at Bargarh, producing 100 KL/day.
The ZLD plant supports E20 Ethanol Blending Programme, reducing emissions and fostering sustainability.

news.title:
BPCL forms JV with Sembcorp to supply green hydrogen to Numaligarh Refinery.
The JV secures a deal to deliver 10,000 tonnes of green hydrogen annually.
news.summary:

news.title:
Goldman Sachs downgrades BPCL to Neutral; target price set at Rs 340.
Rising crude prices hurt BPCL marketing margins, limiting fuel price hike pass-through.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs downgrades BPCL to Neutral; target price set at Rs 340.

news.title:
Crude oil prices dropped 10.1% to $96.06 after Trump paused Iran strikes; later rebounded to $101.
BPCL, HPCL, IOCL, RIL, and Petronet LNG secure LPG and crude shipments amid Hormuz tensions.
news.summary:
Crude oil prices dropped 10.1% to $96.06 after Trump paused Iran strikes; later rebounded to $101.
BPCL, HPCL, IOCL, RIL, and Petronet LNG secure LPG and crude shipments amid Hormuz tensions.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
